channel.title: doom emacs on earnest's site
channel.description: Recent content in doom emacs on earnest's site

item.title: Install Doom Emacs on Windows 10
item.description: I’ve been using Emacs on and off since… last October? (2019) During that time, it was mainly the vanilla GNU Emacs, and I tried Spacemacs, but I could never install Doom Emacs for some reason. Now that I know more, (but still next to nothing), I can, and I’ll try and walk you through it, on Windows 10, without WSL or anything too fancy. I’m using Powershell in Windows Terminal.
